src/App.jsx: <main className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-8">

<div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 h-16 flex items-center justify-between">
src/components/OrderSummary.jsx: <div className="flex justify-between items-center pt-4 bordr-t border-gray-200">
<h2 className="text-lg font-bold text-gray-800 flex items-center gap-2">
<div className="bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-lg border border-gray-100 overflow-hidden">
<button className="w-full bg-blue-600 text-white py-4 rounded-xl font-bold text-lg hover:bg-blue-700 shadow-lg shadow-blue-200 transition-all flex justify-center items-center gap-2">
src/components/CheckoutForm.jsx: <InputField label="Street Address" name="address" placeholder="123 Main Street" error={errors.address} />
<button type="submit" className="w-full bg-indigo-600 text-white py-4 rounded-lg font-semibold text-lg hover:bg-indigo-700 transition disabled:opacity-50" >

<input type={type} name={name} value={formData[name]} onChange={handleChange} placeholder={placeholder} className={`w-full p-3 border rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:border-transparent outline-none transition ${ error ? 'border-red-500 bg-red-50' : 'border-gray-300' }`} />
<span className="flex items-center justify-center w-6 h-6 bg-indigo-600 text-white text-xs rounded-full">
<h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
<InputField label="Cardholder Name" name="cardName" placeholder="John Doe" error={errors.cardName} />
<InputField label="Email Address" name="email" type="email" placeholder="john@example.com" error={errors.email} />
src/components/ProductCard.jsx: <button onClick={onAdd} className="flex items-center gap-1 bg-gray-900 text-white px-3 py-2 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-800 transition-colors text-sm" >
<div className="bg-white rounded-xl border border-gray-100 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow overflow-hidden flex flex-col">
